title: Cinatra WP/Drupal assistant — token-exchange request (v2)
description: Server-to-server POST body the plugin/module BACKEND (holding the long-lived integration key) sends to POST /api/agents/{slug}/token to mint a short-lived, origin/aud/scope-bound stream token. Sent with `Authorization: Bearer <long-lived integration key>`. NEVER sent by the browser.

contractVersion.description: Pins the wire contract; the response echoes it.

origin.description: EXACT site origin the minted token is bound to — scheme://host[:port], no path/query/hash. Must normalize-match the siteUrl of a valid configured instance.

sub.description: Optional CMS editor identity for audit; opaque string.
